meaning: 通道(channel+tunnel);n.英吉利海峡隧道(铁路),水底铁路隧道
examples: The " Chunnel ", a tunnel connecting England and France, is now complete.
The most famous tunnel is the thirty mile "Chunnel" between England and France.
The Chunnel would greatly improve transport links between Britain and the Continent.
In terms of sheer size and complexity, the Channel Tunnel or "Chunnel" connecting England and France is most frequently compared to the BST project.
